$comment: Per-phase composition manifest. The plugin reads meta.status, looks up the matching layout, and assembles the listed components in order. See components/README.md for the component contract.

goal-defining.notes: Goal banner shows partial fields with empty markers. Goal-form component prompts for missing fields.

substrate-selecting.notes: Goal is locked in. substrate-options shows the six substrate cards with fit indicators.

contracts-drafting.notes: Goal + substrate locked. contracts-preview shows the contracts being drafted.

operating.notes: Default operating layout. Substrate manuals may override or extend (e.g., tracker substitutes timeline for kanban).

wrapping-up.notes: Operating layout + a top wrap-banner indicating refusal of structural changes. Kanban often dropped to focus on remaining items.

archived.notes: Read-only snapshot. archive-banner shows the archive timestamp. All action affordances disabled.
